# New Epics to Implement

## Dropdown Width for Universe RiskGroup Filter

The width of the dropdown for the Risk Group filter on the Universe screen is too narrow and cause the items to wrap instead of living on a single line. This makes it difficult to read and select the items in the dropdown. Please adjust the width of the dropdown to ensure that all items are displayed on a single line and are easily readable and selectable while still keeping the main field of the dropdown (what we see before we click on the dropdown button) the width of the column it is in.

You attempted this in Epic 49 but you used panelWidth="auto" which the documentation says will match the width of the trigger width. What we want is panelWidth="" which will allow the panel to be as wide as it need to be to fit the content in the dropdown. Change the existing implementation to use panelWidth="" and adjust the e2e tests accordingly.

Make sure to use the Playwright MCP server to verify your changes.

## Universe > Accounts dropdown is too narrow.

Similar to the dropdown width issue for Universe Risk Group filter, the dropdown width for the Accounts filter on the Universe screen is also too narrow and needs panelWidth="" applied to allow the width to expand to fit the content in the dropdown. Please update the code to apply panelWidth="" to the Accounts filter dropdown and test the changes using the Playwright MCP server to ensure that the dropdown width is adjusted correctly and that all items are displayed on a single line without wrapping.Adjust the e2e tests accordingly to reflect this change.

## Fail to load dividends

You attempted this using dividendhistory.net in epic 50 but I don't believe you even looked at the site. You made the assumption that it worked like dividendhistory.org.

Evaluate dividendhistory.net and determine how this site works and verify your calls to it actually work. Some symbols you can test include: VFL, ACP, IFN, and FAX.
